lines: Perform a 3-second tempo to lower the bar on each repetition.

sections.title: Tempo Pull to Power Position into Squat Snatch
lines: Tempo Pull to Mid Thigh into Squat Snatch
Tempo Pull to Knee into Squat Snatch
Row 500m at flush pace between sets
Use the percentage range as a rough guide.Your pull from the floor to each position should be very slow and technical. The more you need work on technique, the slower and lighter.

lines: Control the negative for all reps, including final rep of set and heavy single.
